Event: Autumn Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: B40
Maple Arrow Bow

When attacking, has a 25% chance of dealing 120% damage to a group of enemies.
Throughout the battle, the archer's attacks start dealing pure damage instead of physical.
When attacking, the bow owner has a 35% chance to petrify the target and all enemy units in a small radius around them for 2 sec and deal 570000 pure damage to them.
Petrified units take 45% more damage and can't move.

Requirements: 98-100
